---
title: "Commercial: Boulder-Os"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

---

__TALLY:__ 
Hi kids! I’m Tally the Talos and I’m going to tell you about New Boulder-Os! A tasty delicious breakfast cereal with all your nutritional needs. 

__TALLY:__
Our dwarves mine out the minerals from the earth and then purify them with the life of Gaia! But be careful! If Nyxmera spots you it’ll want them for itself. 

__TALLY:__
Get Boulder-Os at all your local super markets. They come in a range of colours and flavours including bronze, gold, and bismuth!

__ANNCR:__
 Boulder-Os, eat them with your mouth hole, not your eye holes!
